name: TDD-SUBAGENT-BACKLOG-2
title: Publish tdd-subagent scripts to .claude/agents/tdd-subagent/ with source-target drift protection
description:
The tdd-subagent agent definition is registered at .claude/agents/tdd-subagent.md, but its supporting scripts (dispatch-tdd-subagent.py, tdd-step.py, tdd-drift-check.py, tdd-context.py) remain only under .claude/features/tdd-subagent/scripts/. The agent definition references these scripts by absolute feature path, which creates a tight coupling between the agent surface and the feature internals.

Proposal: publish the scripts as a co-located bundle under .claude/agents/tdd-subagent/ (e.g. .claude/agents/tdd-subagent/scripts/) so the agent is self-contained. Add copy-file entries in build-contract.json for each script with check_on_stop: true so drift between feature source and deployed agent scripts is detected on every Stop. This mirrors how skills are drift-protected and makes the agent boundary explicit.

history.note: Published 4 scripts to .claude/agents/tdd-subagent/scripts/ with copy-file entries in build-contract.json (check_on_stop: true). Agent definition updated to document agent-local script paths. No absolute paths used.
